title: Scott Pilgrim's Precious Little Life
overview: Slacker Scott Pilgrim leads a sweet and simple life. Until sparks fly — and ignite total chaos — when he meets the rainbow-haired girl of his dreams.

title: A League of Their Own
overview: An eclectic crowd of familiar faces gathers under unusual circumstances. Elsewhere, the League of Evil Exes meets up at a secret lair.

title: Ramona Rents a Video
overview: Motivated by a dream, Ramona follows a hunch and confides in a receptive Julie. At a video rental store, a tense run-in with Roxie fuels big feelings.

title: Whatever
overview: Ramona heads to a film set to see Lucas, her movie star ex, whose role in a major Canadian motion picture attracts media attention — and the paparazzi.

title: Lights. Camera. Sparks?!
overview: A documentary about the Toronto production reveals drama — and steamy romance — behind the scenes. Ramona takes on a daring but demanding gig.

title: WHODIDIT
overview: Ramona arrives at Julie's doorstep with more questions and curiosity. A surprise visitor seeks forgiveness from Gideon. Knives taps into new talents.

title: 2 Scott 2 Pilgrim
overview: Unfinished business, mind-blowing revelations — and a mix of lovers, friends and exes. What could go wrong?

title: The World vs Scott Pilgrim
overview: Scott, Ramona and their friends face their toughest challenge yet in a knockdown epic showdown that could change everything.
